recommendations.title: Aliens in the Attic
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A group of kids must protect their vacation home from invading aliens.

recommendations.title: Children of Heaven
recommendations.overview: Zohre's shoes are gone; her older brother Ali lost them. They are poor, there are no shoes for Zohre until they come up with an idea: they will share one pair of shoes. School awaits.

recommendations.title: Adventures in Babysitting
recommendations.overview: Two teen rival babysitters, Jenny and Lola, team up to hunt down one of their kids who accidentally ran away into the big city without any supervision.

recommendations.title: A Christmas Prince: The Royal Baby
recommendations.overview: Christmas brings the ultimate gift to Aldovia: a royal baby. But first, Queen Amber must help her family and kingdom by finding a missing peace treaty.

recommendations.title: Drive Me Crazy

recommendations.title: A Christmas Prince: The Royal Wedding

recommendations.title: Ruby Sparks

recommendations.title: Red Shoes and the Seven Dwarfs
recommendations.genres: Animation, Fantasy, Family, Comedy, Romance, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Princes who have been turned into Dwarfs seek the red shoes of a lady in order to break the spell, although it will not be easy.

recommendations.title: Minnal Murali
recommendations.overview: A tailor gains special powers after being struck by lightning but must take down an unexpected foe if he is to become the superhero his hometown in Kerala needs.
